CustomField.formula: CASE(Text(leaseworks__Transaction_Type_PL__c) ,'Invoice', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c),0,IF( OR(ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined') ,ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Submitted')),null,leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoiced_Amount_Formula__c)) ,'Payable', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payable__c),0,IF( OR(ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Submitted'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled')),null,leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Payable_Amount__c * (-1))) ,'Letter Of Credit', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__c),0,IF(leaseworks__Status__c=='Pending',null,IF(leaseworks__Status__c=='Active',leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__r.leaseworks__LC_Amount_LC_Currency__c,leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__r.leaseworks__LC_Amount_LC_Currency__c* (-1)))) ,'Manual Fund Transfer',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Related_to_Manual_SD__c),0,leaseworks__Related_to_Manual_SD__r.leaseworks__Manual_SD_Transfer_Amount__c) ,null)
CustomField.label: Invoiced Amount
